name: Patient A
history: Death of a close aunt whom the patient considered a mother figure. The patient did not fulfill the aunt's last request and was not present at the time of death. Pattern of prioritizing others' needs over their own.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
intermediate_belief: I must always be there for others, or I am not a good person.
intermediate_belief_depression: If I am not able to fulfill others' needs, I am failing.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of personal needs and focusing on others.
situation: Reflecting on memories involving the aunt and the unfulfilled request.
auto_thought: I should have been there; I failed her.
behavior: Withdrawing from personal needs and focusing on others' needs.
